betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Crafting CPU§f:
The §6Crafting CPU §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_unit) is a §emultiblock controller §f for §6autocrafting§f. It is built from a §6Crafting Unit §f core plus §6Crafting Storage §f and §6Crafting Co-Processor §f blocks, arranged in a 3×3×3 cube.

§6Production Path (network/crafting/cpu_crafting_unit.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / cdc / aba":
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 4 (corners)
- §bb§f: §6Calculation Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:material:23) — 1 (top middle)
- §cc§f: §6ME Glass Cable - Fluix §f(appliedenergistics2:part:16) — 2 (middle left, middle right)
- §cd§f: §6Logic Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:material:22) — 1 (centre)
- Yields 1× Crafting Unit (the CPU core)

§6Crafting Unit Variants§f:
- §bCrafting Unit §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_unit) — the core; 1 unit per CPU
- §bCrafting Co-Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_accelerator) — parallel job slots
- §bCrafting Unit §f pattern: see the §6Molecular Assembler §f quest for the full multiblock structure

§6Function (BlockCraftingUnit.java)§f:
- §bCrafting jobs §f: each Crafting Unit core manages §b1 crafting job §f at a time
- §bCo-Processors §f: each Co-Processor adds §b1 parallel job slot §f and a small storage bump
- §bMolecular Assembler §f: the CPU's "output" face — place a §6Pattern Terminal §f on it to drive crafting
- §bMultiblock §f: the CPU only forms when the 3×3×3 cube is §bcomplete §f with the core at the centre

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 4 items the Crafting CPU is a component of, including:
- §6Crafting Storage §f tiers
- §6Crafting Co-Processor §f
- §6ME Pattern Terminal §f(used in the multiblock)
- §6Molecular Assembler §f(required for the multiblock)

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: start with a §b1×1×1 §f Crafting CPU (just the core) for testing; expand to §b3×3×3 §f once you need more storage
- §eTip§f: place a §6Crafting Monitor §f or §6Crafting Terminal §f on the CPU to see active jobs in real time
- §cWarning§f: a Crafting CPU §cdoes not §f interact with §6Pattern Terminals §f placed elsewhere; the terminal must be §6directly on the CPU's face §f
- §cWarning§f: a CPU with §cno §fMolecular Assembler can §6receive jobs §f but cannot §6execute them §f
